channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump arrives in Beijing with CEOs ahead of Xi meetings
item.description: The president landed in the Chinese capital for a highly anticipated summit with Xi Jinping.

item.title: Wholesale inflation jumps 6% in April on annual basis, biggest increase since 2022
item.description: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.5% in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

item.title: Altman details Musk's OpenAI fallout, says nonprofit was 'left for dead'
item.description: Musk has accused Altman and another OpenAI co-founder of trying to "steal a charity"

item.title: S&P 500 hits another record driven by tech alone as most stocks decline on the day: Live updates
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average fell on Wednesday after another hotter-than-expected inflation report.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Akamai Technologies, Micron, Nebius, Alibaba & more
item.description: Here are the stocks making headlines in midday trading.

item.title: Tech is completely dominating the market. But these sectors could be poised to catch up
item.description: Frank Cappelleri breaks down the charts on these S&P 500 sectors.

item.title: AI-driven cyberattacks will start to be the 'new norm' in months, Palo Alto warns
item.description: The rise of increasingly sophisticated AI models is putting pressure on cybersecurity teams to step up their defenses for newer and faster cyberattacks.

item.title: Jamie Dimon warns JPMorgan may rethink new London office if 'very smart' Starmer is ousted as UK PM
item.description: Starmer's leadership is under pressure, sparking concern in the bond market.

item.title: Anduril doubles valuation to over $60 billion as defense tech funding boom continues
item.description: The company is working on space-based interceptors for Trump's $185 billion Golden Dome defense system

item.title: Trump in China: Traders predict a tariff truce extension and Boeing aircraft purchases
item.description: Traders also think it is likely that the president will talk about Iran, despite his comments that the U.S. doesn't need China's help in resolving the war.

item.title: Mortgage rates move to highest level in 5 weeks, but homebuyers shake it off
item.description: Mortgage rates continued to climb higher, but stronger homebuyer demand helped to keep mortgage applications in positive territory.

item.title: Gas tax holiday as Trump promises? Not so fast, trucking, construction industries say
item.description: President Donald Trump and lawmakers are eyeing federal gas tax relief, but opponents contend a pause wouldn't help consumers and could harm roads.

item.title: Amazon ditches Rufus chatbot, launches Alexa shopping agent in AI strategy pivot
item.description: Amazon introduced Alexa for Shopping, an e-commerce bot that can answer queries and take actions on behalf of users

item.title: This pharma name targeting aging has soared this year. BTIG thinks it can double from here
item.description: The investment firm initiated coverage of the biopharmaceutical name with a buy rating.

item.title: The gold chart looks poised for a bounce. How to play it for less
item.description: If you've been watching the SPDR Gold Shares (GLD), you know the yellow metal has been consolidating and appears to be bouncing off its 150-day moving average (support).

item.title: Hyperscalers' AI buildout will require massive amounts of energy. Two under-the-radar stocks will benefit
item.description: The magnitude of the A.I. capital spending boom is historic and the dollar values are staggering.

item.title: Alibaba jumps as it strikes bullish tone on AI investments, even as profit plunges
item.description: Alibaba on Wednesday said its core profitability plunged in the March quarter amid heavy investments in tech and e-commerce.

item.title: South Carolina Supreme Court overturns Alex Murdaugh’s murder convictions in deaths of wife and son
item.description: The ruling is a win for Murdaugh, who has adamantly denied killing his wife Maggie and younger son Paul since he found their bodies outside their home in 2021.

item.title: 10-year Treasury yield hits new high for the year after very hot producer prices reading
item.description: Treasury yields climbed after a hotter-than-expected reading on the producer price index.

item.title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang bets on this British startup to build 'next frontier' of AI
item.description: Months-old Ineffable Intelligence announced a record $1.1 billion seed round in April.

item.title: This stock is our favorite way to hedge against the pickup in inflation
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: This map shows the average credit score by state. Where does yours rank?
item.description: CNBC Select takes a look at the states with the highest and lowest credit scores, and some tools to help improve your own

item.title: Air India cuts international flights amid Middle East conflict
item.description: The Iran war has triggered airspace closures, forced longer reroutings and driven a sharp rise in global fuel costs, adding pressure on global airlines.

item.title: Hormuz closure cuts OPEC oil production by 30% and threatens demand growth this year, cartel says
item.description: Global demand is facing constraints because supply from the Persian Gulf has been effectively cut off by Iran's blockade of the Strait of the Hormuz.

item.title: Capital One files lawsuit against alleged 'scam campaign' operators — for trademark infringement
item.description: Capital One is suing unknown defendants, alleging that they use automated or prerecorded calls posing as representatives for the bank.

item.title: Whipsaw market actions leaves traders looking for direction. The 'fear gauge' might offer a clue
item.description: Volatility in the S&P 500 as measured by the Cboe VIX Index ended down on Tuesday, despite a brief pop to 19.01, the highest since April 28.

item.title: Walmart cuts 1,000 roles to simplify operations, Reuters reports
item.description: Under new CEO John Furner ​and a ​reshaped leadership team, the ​retailer is doubling down on a tech-focused strategy.

item.title: Oil price spike turmoil far from over, IEA says as inventories are depleted at “record pace"
item.description: The IEA's oil market report for May noted that global oil supply declined by a further 1.8 million barrels per day in April.

item.title: How to answer this tricky interview question, says career expert: It shows you have skills that 'cannot be replaced' by AI
item.description: In today's job market, interpersonal skills are a top priority for hirers, according to career expert Erin McGoff.

item.title: Kool-Aid to launch electrolyte packets with no artificial dyes as part of Kraft Heinz makeover
item.description: Parent company Kraft Heinz is trying to reverse slumping sales by modernizing many of its legacy brands.
